subject: Human Resources
title: Employee Experience Design
description: A fast breakdown of Employee Experience Design for builders.

hook.text: A company redesigns its customer experience and sees revenue soar.

buildup.text: Employee experience (EX) encompasses every touchpoint—hiring, onboarding, daily work, development, technology, and even exit.

discovery.text: Companies with top-quartile EX have 25% higher profitability—engaged employees create better customer experiences and outcomes.

twist.text: Most companies design EX reactively—fixing problems after complaints.

climax.text: Journey mapping, employee personas, and continuous feedback loops transform HR from a compliance function into a design function.

punchline.text: Great customer experience starts with great employee experience.

quiz.question: How much higher is profitability for companies with top employee experience?
